name: codex-storyboard
description: Create and manage storyboard projects, process image and video generation tasks, and return assets to the local Codex storyboard.

interface.shortDescription: Create storyboards and generate their image and video assets.
interface.longDescription: Codex Storyboard lets Codex create, find, update, and delete complete local storyboard projects without browser automation. It also reads pending shots, honors project aspect ratios and DESIGN.md, routes image assets to Image Generation or Jimeng CLI, routes videos to Jimeng CLI, and returns outputs to the correct project and row.
defaultPrompt: Create a complete storyboard project from my video idea and write it into Codex Storyboard.
Find and update my local storyboard project.
Process all pending Codex storyboard generation tasks.
Generate the pending storyboard image assets and return them to the storyboard.
Generate the pending Jimeng CLI shots and return the rendered videos.
